title: Disco Of The Damned The Gathering
description: Join award-winning creatives Lost Hippo for a joyful, cult-themed party night of disco beats, cabaret, comedy and immersive theatre. This high-energy party is led by our charismatic host and self-proclaimed Prophet, and soundtracked by funk and disco all night long. Expect live cabaret acts, playful rituals, and euphoric dancing at one of the Fringe’s most iconic venues. On the surface, Disco of the Damned is a glittering celebration of disco, funk and joy. But peek behind the curtains and you'll see that this “Disco Cult” has more than meets the eye. Step into the Temple of Confession, be initiated in the Baptismal Ball Pit, or simply dance, watch and soak up the madness. Immersive theatre runs throughout the night, with no pressure to participate — the more you lean in, the more you’ll discover. Brighton's funkiest cult is back, reimagined with more cabaret, more ritualistic madness and even more funk. Come for the disco. Stay for the joy. Leave wondering what you just joined.

venue.name: Klub Kaput at Caravanserai
venue.address: North of St Peter's Church, York Place, East Sussex
